data.title: UCB Selects Georgia for New U.S. Biologics Manufacturing Facility; ~$5B Economic Impact and ~330 Permanent Jobs
data.description: UCB has chosen Gwinnett County, Georgia to establish a new facility, aiming to enhance its global biologics manufacturing network and cater to the rising demand across its portfolio and pipeline. The decision was made public on March 24, 2026 by UCB, signifying a substantial investment in the region. This move is anticipated to bring a significant influx of economic activity and job opportunities to the county, showcasing the increasing importance of the biologics sector. The newly selected site in Gwinnett County will serve as a pivotal hub for UCB's operations, consolidating its position as a key player in the biopharmaceutical industry.

data.title: Russian hacker sentenced to 81 months for $9M ransomware attacks; facilitated multiple attacks in U.S., causing total losses exceeding $9M.
data.description: Aleksei Volkov orchestrated numerous attacks throughout the United States as an "initial access broker," resulting in more than $9 million in tangible damages.

data.title: Cypress Manors - Launch of brand new Luxury Townhome community
data.description: In Cypress, Texas, on March 24, 2026, Alexander Grene Development introduced Cypress Manors, a new boutique rental home community. Located in the heart of Cypress, the development aims to cater to the increasing population in the area. Cypress Manors is designed with a focus on wellness and offers a unique living experience. The community includes a variety of amenities and features tailored to meet the needs of residents.

data.title: Seasoned Entrepreneur Opens New Pet Supplies Plus Location in Columbus Serving Local Pets with Products & Services
data.description: New Pet Supplies Plus in Columbus, Ohio, opened its doors on January 30, 2026, at 4830 Sawmill Rd in the Carriage Place shopping center. This new location promises the best prices, selection, and service guaranteed for pet owners. With a focus on providing convenience, the store aims to cater to the needs of pet parents in the area.

data.title: TSEA Energy Invests $25 Million in U.S. Manufacturing Facility to Support Grid Modernization
data.description: A new facility in North Carolina is set to enhance production proximity to utilities, ensuring better supply reliability and generating 160 job opportunities. The facility in Eden, NC is scheduled to commence operations on March 24, 2026. With increasing demands for electricity and the need to upgrade aging grid infrastructure, U.S. utilities are under mounting pressure to modernize. TSEA Energy's strategic move aims to address these challenges and contribute to the industry's development.

data.title: Denver Mattress in Grand Island is Now Home to a Rest & Recline Recliner Gallery!
data.description: Denver Mattress Co. has introduced a new Rest & Recline gallery at its Grand Island store in Nebraska. The store is situated at 2341 N. Diers Ave. near the intersection of US-281 and W. Capital. This new feature is set to enhance customer experience with added comfort. The location of the store makes it easily accessible to customers in the area.

data.title: EntTelligence Launches CAPTIVE to Deliver Verified Reach Measurement for In-Theater Advertising
data.description: EntTelligence recently unveiled CAPTIVE, a cutting-edge analytics platform created specifically for providing accurate reach measurement for in-cinema advertisements. The platform utilizes EntTelligence's specialized theatrical data infrastructure to enhance the measurement process. This launch was made public in Los Angeles on March 24, 2026. The goal of CAPTIVE is to provide reliable data for advertisers looking to target audiences in theaters. The platform is expected to revolutionize the way in-theater advertising effectiveness is evaluated, offering precise insights for marketers.
